title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma South Asia Partners:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma South Asia Partners!
